## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / deps / infra
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `breaking change` — API contract or schema change
